languages.text: "Я экзальтирован! Теперь, когда Нунциус со мной навеки, вместе мы сможем усовершенствовать процедуру триасомии. Сколько нас ждет триумфов, как много блага мы принесем человечеству! И за это мы должны благодарить вас, {name}. Правда, Нунциус?"

"I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "Я экзальтирован! Теперь, когда Нунциус со мной навеки, вместе мы сможем усовершенствовать процедуру триасомии. Сколько нас ждет триумфов, как много блага мы принесем человечеству! И за это мы должны благодарить вас, {name}. Правда, Нунциус?"

traits.locale_text: "I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

"I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

"I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

languages.text: «¡Estoy pletórico! Ahora que Nuncius estará conmigo para siempre, juntos lograremos refinar el procedimiento triasómico. ¡Oh, cuántos triunfos nos aguardan, cuánto bien obraremos para la Humanidad! Y todo se lo debemos a usted, {name}. ¿Verdad que sí, Nuncius?».
languages.original_text: "I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Estoy pletórico! Ahora que Nuncius estará conmigo para siempre, juntos lograremos refinar el procedimiento triasómico. ¡Oh, cuántos triunfos nos aguardan, cuánto bien obraremos para la Humanidad! Y todo se lo debemos a usted, {name}. ¿Verdad que sí, Nuncius?».

languages.text: “我简直欣喜若狂！既然努恩修斯永远和我在一起了，我们就能一起完善三相融合程序。还有多少成就等着我们！我们能为人类带来多少福祉！这一切都得感谢您，{name}。对吧，努恩修斯？”
languages.original_text: "I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: “我简直欣喜若狂！既然努恩修斯永远和我在一起了，我们就能一起完善三相融合程序。还有多少成就等着我们！我们能为人类带来多少福祉！这一切都得感谢您，{name}。对吧，努恩修斯？”

languages.text: « Je suis fou de joie ! Maintenant que Nuncius est avec moi pour toujours, nous allons pouvoir perfectionner la procédure de triasomia. Imaginez tous les triomphes qui nous attendent, tous les exploits que nous accomplirons pour le bien de l'humanité ! Et c'est à vous que nous le devons, {name}. N'est-ce pas, Nuncius ? »
languages.original_text: "I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: « Je suis fou de joie ! Maintenant que Nuncius est avec moi pour toujours, nous allons pouvoir perfectionner la procédure de triasomia. Imaginez tous les triomphes qui nous attendent, tous les exploits que nous accomplirons pour le bien de l'humanité ! Et c'est à vous que nous le devons, {name}. N'est-ce pas, Nuncius ? »

languages.text: "Mest oldum! Artık Nuncius sonsuza dek benimle olduğuna göre üçyeközleştirme prosedürünü birlikte geliştirebiliriz. Bizi büyük başarılar bekliyor, İnsanlığa büyük iyiliklerde bulunacağız! Bunun için size teşekkür borçluyuz. Öyle değil mi Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: "Mest oldum! Artık Nuncius sonsuza dek benimle olduğuna göre üçyeközleştirme prosedürünü birlikte geliştirebiliriz. Bizi büyük başarılar bekliyor, İnsanlığa büyük iyiliklerde bulunacağız! Bunun için size teşekkür borçluyuz. Öyle değil mi Nuncius?"

languages.text: "Ich bin verzückt! Nun, da Nuncius für immer bei mir ist, können wir die Triasomia-Prozedur gemeinsam perfektionieren. Wie viele Triumphe warten auf uns, wie viel Gutes werden wir für die Menschheit tun! Und dafür haben wir Euch zu danken, {name}. Ist es nicht so, Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin verzückt! Nun, da Nuncius für immer bei mir ist, können wir die Triasomia-Prozedur gemeinsam perfektionieren. Wie viele Triumphe warten auf uns, wie viel Gutes werden wir für die Menschheit tun! Und dafür haben wir Euch zu danken, {name}. Ist es nicht so, Nuncius?"

languages.text: 「私は有頂天です！ ヌンキウスが永遠に私と共にいる今、我々は二人で、トリアソミアの手技を洗練させていける。どれほどの偉業が我々を待っていることか、どれほどの善を人類にもたらせることか！ そして、それもこれも、あなたのおかげなのです、{name}。そうだろう、ヌンキウス？」
languages.original_text: "I am ecstatic! Now that Nuncius is with me forever, together we can refine the triasomia procedure. How many triumphs await us, how much good we will deliver to Humanity! And for that we have you to thank, {name}. Isn't that right, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: 「私は有頂天です！ ヌンキウスが永遠に私と共にいる今、我々は二人で、トリアソミアの手技を洗練させていける。どれほどの偉業が我々を待っていることか、どれほどの善を人類にもたらせることか！ そして、それもこれも、あなたのおかげなのです、{name}。そうだろう、ヌンキウス？」
